title: open-AIMS/toxval: Release version 1.0.0
author: Rebecca Fisher
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This release supports extraction of increasing and decreasing nsec values from multivariate response models fitted using brms, as well as univariate brms, bayesnec and drc model fits. Univariate brms and drc model fits also support including a grouping variable. 
 ECx extraction is supported for bayesnec and brms models only in this release.
steps_raw:
This release supports extraction of increasing and decreasing nsec values from multivariate response models fitted using brms, as well as univariate brms, bayesnec and drc model fits. Univariate brms and drc model fits also support including a grouping variable. 
 ECx extraction is supported for bayesnec and brms models only in this release.
